title: Citation
description: A specific reference to evidence within a source. ID comes from the map key in the parent structure.

page.description: Page number, record number, or location within source

data_date.description: Date the data was recorded (for documentary sources)

text_from_source.description: Transcription or excerpt from the source

repository.description: Reference to Repository where source is held

media.description: References to Media entities (scans, photos, documents) related to this citation
